text: A portion of things that are paper objects are books. Among the items known as notebooks, some are paper objects. This allows us to state that not all notebooks are books.

premise1.subject: paper object
premise1.raw_text: A portion of things that are paper objects are books.

premise2.subject: notebook
premise2.raw_text: Among the items known as notebooks, some are paper objects.

conclusion.subject: notebook
conclusion.raw_text: This allows us to state that not all notebooks are books.

validity_details.reason: Affirmative premises cannot yield negative conclusion; Two particular premises (Fallacy of Two Particulars); Undistributed middle term; Illicit major: 'book'
